mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_template_preview_page ( id, template_id, user_id, template_version, page_index, storage_type, file_path, object_key, width, height, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{templateVersion}, #{pageIndex}, #{storageType}, #{filePath}, #{objectKey}, #{width}, #{height}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, page_index, storage_type, file_path, object_key, width, height, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_preview_page WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND template_version = #{templateVersion} ORDER BY page_index ASC

SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, page_index, storage_type, file_path, object_key, width, height, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_preview_page WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND template_version = #{templateVersion} AND page_index = #{pageIndex} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, page_index, storage_type, file_path, object_key, width, height, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_preview_page WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY template_version ASC, page_index ASC
